label: mobile_app_keerthanaa

1.query: INSERT INTO job_card_keerthanaa (job_title, equipment, description, customer_id, status, created_at , technician_id) VALUES ('{{input_data.job_title_input.[index]}}', '{{input_data.equipment_input.[index]}}', '{{input_data.remarks_input.[index]}}', '{{arguments.customer_id}}', 'Created', NOW() , '<!getUserId()!>')

back_confirmation.title: Confirm Navigation
back_confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to go back? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

1.query: UPDATE job_card_keerthanaa SET status = 'Completed',signature = '{{input_data.input_sig.[index].url}}',remarks = '{{input_data.remarks_input.[index]}}',end_job = '{<!getLocation().longitude!>, <!getLocation().latitude!>}', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{arguments.job_id}}'

back_confirmation.title: Confirm Navigation
back_confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to go back? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

1.query: UPDATE job_card_keerthanaa SET status = 'In Progress', start_job = '{<!getLocation().longitude!>, <!getLocation().latitude!>}', started_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{arguments.job_id}}'

ui.search_query: SELECT first_name, id, last_name, email FROM customer_form_keerthanaa WHERE (first_name ilike '%search_term%' OR last_name ilike '%search_term%' OR email ilike '%search_term%')

data.customers: SELECT first_name , id , last_name , email FROM customer_form_keerthanaa

2.query: SELECT j.*, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY j.id DESC LIMIT {{functions.1.data.[0].new_limit}}

data.job: SELECT j.*, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY j.id DESC LIMIT 10
data.customer: SELECT * FROM  customer_form_keerthanaa ORDER BY id DESC

1.query: UPDATE job_card_keerthanaa SET evidence = '{{input_data.evidence_input.[index].url}}', part = '{{input_data.log_parts_input.[index]}}', status = 'Evidence Created' WHERE id = {{arguments.job_id}}

data.job_info: SELECT j.*, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id WHERE j.id = {{arguments.job_id}}

back_confirmation.title: Confirm Navigation
back_confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to go back? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

ui.text: Track and update field job cards

ui.events: SELECT created_at::date as date FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}}

data.jobs: SELECT * FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}} AND created_at::date = '{{input_data.job_calendar}}' ORDER BY id DESC

ui.search_hint: Search by equipment, job type or status...
ui.search_query: SELECT * FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}} and (equipment ilike '%search_term%' or job_title ilike '%search_term%') ORDER BY id DESC

2.query: SELECT * FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT {{functions.1.data.[0].new_limit}}

data.jobs: SELECT * FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10

description: A new app created with the app builder
